name: cli-tool
description: CLI tool with commands, parsers, and output

step_descriptions.types: Define types for {{feature_name}} CLI options, arguments, and config
step_descriptions.parsers: Create argument parsers and validators for {{feature_name}}
step_descriptions.output: Implement output formatting (table, JSON, human-readable) for {{feature_name}}
step_descriptions.tests: Write tests for {{feature_name}} commands covering happy path and errors
step_descriptions.docs: Write help text and documentation for {{feature_name}} commands

criteria: Stderr for error output, stdout for data

decompose.feature_description: Database migration tool with up/down/status commands

review.task_output: Added 3 commands, help text, JSON output. All tests pass.
